meaning: n.衣服的沙沙声,大量的装饰
examples: Why settle for a froufrou cup of calories when you can have this frothy and yes, healthy Cafe Latte meal?
Shaving cream: I love the idea of shaving cream, but sometimes the fruity or floral varieties marketed to women are just too froufrou for me.
Valerie Wade, owner of a London interiors shop, remembers such a froufrou style from her childhood.
